## Meeting Purpose

[To review Strapi comparison page publishing process and discuss content management tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New workflow for Strapi comparison pages: ignore initial title/intro, use Content Cards List component, treat H3s as H2s](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Usman to prioritize publishing Strapi articles (9) before addressing Galileo article](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Vivek emphasized keeping Airtable organized and up-to-date during his vacation](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [Mara will be the point of contact for engineering requests and high-level approaches in Vivek's absence](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)

## Topics

### Strapi Comparison Page Publishing Process

  - [Added Directus, Highgraph, and Storyblock to comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Process: Go to Strapi CMS \> Content Manager \> Comparator](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Ignore initial title/intro in Markdown](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Use Content Cards List component, label as "Strapi vs \[Competitor\]"](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Treat H3s as H2s, paste content under each section](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [CTA placement unclear, needs clarification from Gulzar](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### Content Management and Workflow

  - [Refreshed articles go to "published" section, not "refreshes"](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Extensible article: Mika to specify where new sections should be inserted](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Speed to Market article: Usman to complete after DataGrid (est. 30 mins)](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Galileo article: Usman to make edits, Vivek to review later](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Ismail to edit Galileo articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Task Prioritization

  - [Usman to focus on publishing Strapi articles (9) before Galileo](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [For next week: Start with status updates and smaller tasks in the first hour](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Front-load work to avoid delays pushing into Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)

### Communication During Vivek's Vacation

  - [Tag Mara for engineering requests and high-level approaches](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Mara has context about Strapi project](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Usman to follow up on engineering requests persistently](https://fathom.video/share/WU-w1fzvzT8z4Eg8-25-GBiA4FtfAeUD?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
